name: NPN Transistor Switch
description: NPN BJT as saturated switch driving a relay coil. Base resistor R1 limits IB. D1 (flyback diode) protects transistor from relay coil back-EMF. R2 is base pull-down to ensure off-state.
notes: Choose Q1 with IC > relay coil current. Vce(sat) ≈ 0.2V. IB = (Vin − 0.7) / R1. For saturation: IB > IC/hFE. With 2N2222 (hFE≥100), IC=50mA coil: IB min = 0.5mA, so R1 = (5V−0.7V)/1mA = 4.3kΩ max. Use 1kΩ for margin. D1 = 1N4148 or 1N4007 across relay coil, cathode to V+.

components.notes: Flyback diode — cathode to V+, anode to collector
